message:
fix: commit town-level config changes after rig add/adopt (gt-n2kn)

gt rig add and gt rig adopt update three town-level files — mayor/rigs.json,
mayor/daemon.json, and .beads/routes.jsonl — but did not git-add and git-commit
them in the town repo. This caused changes to be silently reverted by any
process that does a git restore/checkout (e.g., the JSONL git backup patrol).

Add commitTownConfigChanges() helper that stages and commits these files after
both rig add and rig adopt complete their config updates.
